# Work Report (2026-04-28 to 2026-04-30)

*Autogenerated by TaskLedger*

## 🦀 Things I've been working on

- **[CNTRLPLANE-1349: Expand HyperShift e2e test suite](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-1349)**
  - Pushed fix to drop guest cluster availability zones to resolve test framework mismatch with Azure zone-based NodePools
  - Merged PR
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/release/pull/78133

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3222: Migrate self-managed Azure e2e tests to v2 Ginkgo framework](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3222)**
  - Pushed fix for missing --dns-zone-rg-name in Azure management cluster destroy step
  - Pushed fix for missing --dns-zone-rg-name in destroy-guests step for self-managed Azure
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/release/pull/77674

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3340: Extract support/podspec package from support/util](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3340)**
  - Ran e2e verification testing on podspec extraction PR
  - Merged PR
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8354

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3342: Extract support/networkvisibility package from support/util](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3342)**
  - Opened PR to extract network utility functions into new support/netutil package and updated callers
  - Marked PR as verified by UT and e2e
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8360

- **[OCPBUGS-77109: CPO is missing the UserAgent in the telemetry options when authenticating to Azure Cloud](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-77109)**
  - Opened PR to cherry-pick Azure ARM client UserAgent telemetry to release-4.20
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8374

- **[OCPBUGS-83790: Azure workload identity webhook FailurePolicy: Fail causes bootstrap race condition and component restarts](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-83790)**
  - Removed hold and retriggered CI
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8288

- **[OCPBUGS-84251: Self-managed Azure: stale role assignments cause 403 AuthorizationFailed on cluster re-creation](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-84251)**
  - Merged PR: fix(azure): detect and replace stale role assignments on cluster re-creation
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8322

- **[OCPBUGS-84684: Azure self-managed CI dump tarball censored by leaktk/gcs-filter](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-84684)**
  - Opened PR to exclude sensitive logs from Azure dump tarball to prevent gcs-filter censoring
  - Addressed csrwng's review feedback to copy excluded logs to artifact dir before tarring
  - Merged PR
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/release/pull/78555
